testcase.name: verifySearchBar

failure.message: Search bar element was not visible on the webpage context. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Search bar element was not visible on the webpage context. expected [true] but found [false] at tests.MyRecipesTest.verifySearchBar(MyRecipesTest.java:28) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 30 stack frames
